headline: BTQ Technologies Completes Acquisition of QPerfect, Advancing Its Mission of Building Trusted Quantum Technologies With World-Class Emulation, Digital Twin, and Control Capabilities
summary: BTQ Technologies Corp. ("BTQ" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: BTQ) (CBOE CA: BTQ), a global quantum technology company focused on securing mission-critical networks, is pleased to announce that it has completed the acquisition of QPerfect SA ("QPerfect"), a French quantum computing company based in Strasbourg specializing in quantum software, emulation, digital twin capabilities, and control systems.

headline: QDTE’s 48% Yield Is Shrinking Fast As Volatility Drops Below 17
summary: The Roundhill Innovation-100 0DTE Covered Call Strategy ETF (CBOE:QDTE) pays income every single week, and that cadence is the entire reason people own it. QDTE sells zero-days-to-expiration call options against synthetic NASDAQ-100 exposure, then routes the collected premiums back to shareholders as distributions that most recently ran $0.24 per share on July 1, 2026. With ... QDTE’s 48% Yield Is Shrinking Fast As Volatility Drops Below 17

headline: Can Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Justify Its Price On Record Options Volumes?
summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) reported record trading volumes across its four U.S. options exchanges in June 2026, including a single-day high of 33.4 million contracts, drawing fresh attention to the stock. See our latest analysis for Cboe Global Markets. The record volume news lands at a time when Cboe Global Markets’ share price has been volatile. The company recorded a 6.58% 7 day share price return after a period where the 30 day share price return fell 8.25%, while the 5 year total...
